model.fusion_demo.dq_rollup.name: dq_rollup
model.fusion_demo.dq_rollup.raw_code:
{# Synthetic dbt-fusion fixture: csv rows ship as a RAW STRING body (cute-dbt#127). #}
select entity_type, quarantined_count, is_dq_valid from {{ ref('src_checks') }}

unit_test.fusion_demo.test_dq_rollup_csv.name: test_dq_rollup_csv_raw_string
unit_test.fusion_demo.test_dq_rollup_csv.description: Synthetic dbt-fusion 2.0-preview unit test whose given/expect csv fixtures encode rows as a RAW CSV STRING (the fusion divergence vs dbt-core's array-of-string-dicts). Exercises cute-dbt's fusion-csv NEW path end-to-end: the raw-string body parses via the RFC 4180 parser and each field is value-inferred (cute-dbt#127) so quarantined_count 1 vs 1.00 and is_dq_valid false vs TRUE converge. Pure synthetic data only; fusion_demo, src_checks, and the row values are fictitious (no real data).
